messages.repository.setup.title: CDDA Launcher
messages.repository.setup.description: Select a folder where the launcher will keep game builds, mods, soundpacks, tilesets and its local repository metadata.

messages.repository.setup.rule.nonEmptyFolder.pre: A non-empty folder is accepted only when it already contains a valid
messages.repository.setup.rule.persistedPath: The selected path is stored in the launcher profile and survives app updates.
messages.repository.loading.title: Loading repository
messages.repository.ready.title: CDDA Launcher
messages.repository.ready.description: Local repository has been validated. Version discovery can be connected next.
messages.updater.description.checking: Looking for a newer launcher version.
messages.updater.description.available: The update will be downloaded automatically.
messages.updater.description.downloaded: Restart the app to install it now, or continue working and install later.
messages.updater.error.packagedOnly: Real update check is available only in packaged app.
messages.updater.error.metadataMissing: Update metadata is missing in the latest GitHub release.
messages.updater.error.checkFailed: Cannot check for updates right now. Please try again later.

messages.settings.appearance.title: Appearance

messages.settings.advanced.title: Advanced

messages.contentSheet.tileset.title: Tileset

messages.contentSheet.placeholder.description: Business logic is not connected yet. This sidebar locks in the future interface structure.
messages.contentSheet.selection.title: Current selection
messages.contentSheet.selection.description: The selected item, its status and quick actions will appear here later.
messages.dock.status.tooltip.uiOnly: The status dot is reserved for game installation/update health. It is neutral while game business logic is not connected.
messages.dock.status.tooltip.repositoryMissing: Select a local repository before choosing a game platform.
messages.home.description: Manage the selected installation, quick launch, and last-world details.
messages.home.install.title: Game is not installed yet
messages.home.install.description: Install the latest found version for this platform, or open the version list to choose a specific release.

messages.home.card.world.description: Quick continue target after save discovery is connected.

messages.home.card.backups.description: Manual world backup and latest backup restore entry points.
messages.home.gameState.loading.title: Checking game versions
messages.home.gameState.loading.description: Reading local installs and looking for the latest compatible release.
messages.home.gameState.error.title: Game version check failed
messages.home.gameState.error.description: Cannot read game installation state right now.
messages.home.update.title: New experimental build is available
messages.home.update.description: Version {version} is available. It can be installed next to the current one and rolled back if needed.
messages.home.install.noRelease: No compatible version was found for this platform.
messages.install.option.copyUserdata: Copy saves and settings from the current version
messages.versions.title: Versions
messages.versions.description.unavailable: Select a repository before managing game versions.
messages.versions.installed.title: Installed versions
messages.versions.installed.saves: Saves and settings are kept separately for this version
messages.versions.available.title: Available versions
messages.home.action.lastWorldTooltip: Launch the selected world with --world. If the world has multiple characters, the game will load the first one alphabetically.
messages.home.version.latestUnknown: Latest version could not be checked yet.
messages.install.progress.resolvingReleaseDescrip: Looking for a compatible version and preparing the download.
messages.install.progress.extractingDescription: Extraction can take a few minutes. Progress at this stage is estimated.
messages.install.progress.preparingSavesDescripti: Creating a separate saves and settings folder for this version.
messages.install.progress.finalizingDescription: Writing the manifest and switching the active version.
messages.install.progress.completedDescription: The version is ready to launch.
messages.install.modal.title: Install version
messages.install.modal.description: Version {version} will be installed as a separate install and made active when finished.
messages.deleteInstall.modal.title: Delete version
messages.deleteInstall.modal.description: Version {version} will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
messages.releaseNotes.modal.title: Version changes

messages.releaseNotes.modal.emptyUpdateRange: Could not load the changelog between the current and latest versions.
messages.home.action.lastWorldTooltipRunning: Last world cannot be launched while the game is already running.
messages.home.world.noCurrent: Worlds found, but the last world is unknown
messages.home.saveStatus.notInstalled: The game is not installed yet.
